description_long: This is a modern sectional couch upholstered in a muted red fabric, featuring a left-facing chaise lounge and a three-seat main section. The couch includes three backrest cushions that are integrated into the structure, providing a continuous and supportive back. Two accent pillows with striped patterns in neutral tones add visual interest and comfort. The armrests are straight and boxy, matching the overall geometric design of the couch. The legs are short, black, and block-shaped, barely visible beneath the base, giving the couch a grounded appearance. The upholstery has a subtle, repeating geometric pattern, adding texture without overwhelming the design.
description: A modern red sectional couch with a left chaise, integrated back cushions, and two striped accent pillows. Features straight armrests, subtle geometric upholstery, and short block legs.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the full sectional layout, two accent pillows, and the chaise lounge extension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chaise lounge and the straight, boxy armrest with accent pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the subtle geometric upholstery pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the main seating area, straight armrest, and accent pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three integrated backrest cushions span the length of the couch, with a single seat cushion for the chaise and a continuous seat for the main section. Two loose accent pillows are placed at each end.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a muted red fabric with a subtle, repeating geometric pattern, providing a textured but understated appearance.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, block-shaped, and black, mostly hidden beneath the base, giving a low-profile look.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, boxy, and fully upholstered in the same red fabric, matching the couch's geometric style and height with the backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is medium-height, continuous, and features three integrated, non-tufted cushions for a streamlined appearance.
